subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and leaf of My divine Lote-Tree! The winds of perfidy have blown, and leaves have fallen from the Tree of the Cause, whereat lamentation hath arisen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و ورقه سدرتی قد هبت روایح النفاق و سقطت من سدره الامر اوراق بها ناح
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
